cit.basis: Sector-dependent CIT: 25% standard/general; 30% for banks, financial institutions, insurance, telecom and petroleum; 20% for special industries.
cit.note: Administered by the Inland Revenue Department (IRD). AI-estimated; verify against official guidance.

vat.note: Value Added Tax levied at 13% on taxable supplies of goods and services.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive individual income tax; not modelled in this SME estimator.

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated rates. NOT verified against official primary sources. Must be validated against Inland Revenue Department guidance (https://ird.gov.np/) and a local tax advisor before filing or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; Nepal's fiscal year (mid-July to mid-July, Bikram Sambat) and transitional periods differ from the calendar year.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates are AI-estimated and simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Sector classification, rebates, relief, filing, and industry-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
